highlights.text: I wrote at the close Monday this week: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
They buy dips via my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
We had been long on this - as updated everyday at the close since - for a 120+ point rally.
The same way as always, via a Failed Breakdown.

I wrote at the close yesterday that: “Another option is the Failed Breakdown of today’s daily low at 6693.” Overnight we flushed 6693 down to 6680, recovered, then the squeeze began today back to 6757+ October is off to a strong start.

post_title: October Trading Starts Off With A Bang In SPX. Sign of What's To Come? Oct 2nd Plan
